description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind Docs that triggers on pushes to the development branch and on pull requests to development, but only for files in amr-wind, docs, and .github/workflows/docs.yml. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies including doxygen, graphviz, sphinx, and sphinx_rtd_theme, build documentation with sphinx-build and doxygen, and deploy to gh-pages if the event is a push.
